NIGHTMOON-NUN_CONFESSION_POWER.title: Confession
NIGHTMOON-NUN_CONFESSION_POWER.descripti: At the end of your turn, a random enemy loses HP equal to your Confession. Then Confession decreases by 1.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_CONFESSION_POWER.smartDesc: At the end of your turn, a random enemy loses {Amount} HP. Then Confession decreases by 1.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_PRAYER_ZONE_POWER.title: Prayer Zone
NIGHTMOON-NUN_PRAYER_ZONE_POWER.descript: At the start of your turn, Prayer countdowns decrease. When a Prayer reaches 0, it resolves.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_PRAYER_ZONE_POWER.smartDes: At the start of your turn, Prayer countdowns decrease.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_CONFESSION_RECORD_POWER.de: At the start of your turn, lose 1 HP and gain Confession.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_CONFESSION_RECORD_POWER.sm: At the start of your turn, lose 1 HP and gain {Amount} Confession.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_LINKED_CASTING_POWER.title: Linked Casting
NIGHTMOON-NUN_LINKED_CASTING_POWER.descr: The next few times you play a Skill, draw 1 card.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_LINKED_CASTING_POWER.smart: The next {Amount} times you play a Skill, draw 1 card.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_LIFE_CHARM_POWER.title: Life Charm
NIGHTMOON-NUN_HOLY_IMAGE_POWER.title: Holy Image
NIGHTMOON-NUN_HOLY_IMAGE_POWER.descripti: Whenever one of your Prayer timers decreases by 1, gain Confession.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_HOLY_IMAGE_POWER.smartDesc: Whenever one of your Prayer timers decreases by 1, gain {Amount} Confession.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_DOOM_CALAMITY_POWER.title: Doom Calamity
NIGHTMOON-NUN_DOOM_CALAMITY_POWER.descri: At the end of your turn, advance your current Prayers by 1 turn.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_DOOM_CALAMITY_POWER.smartD: At the end of your turn, advance your current Prayers by 1 turn.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_ENCIRCLING_POWER.title: Encircling
NIGHTMOON-NUN_ENCIRCLING_POWER.descripti: At the end of your turn, gain Block for each Prayer waiting.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_ENCIRCLING_POWER.smartDesc: At the end of your turn, gain {Amount} Block for each Prayer waiting.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_SHIELD_PRAYER_POWER.title: Shield Prayer
NIGHTMOON-NUN_SHIELD_PRAYER_POWER.descri: At the start of your turn, gain 7 Block.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_SHIELD_PRAYER_POWER.smartD: At the start of your turn, gain 7 Block.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_MANA_SURGE_POWER.title: Mana Surge
NIGHTMOON-NUN_MANA_SURGE_POWER.descripti: At the start of each turn, gain 1 Energy. Prayer cards take additional turns.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_MANA_SURGE_POWER.smartDesc: At the start of each turn, gain 1 Energy. Prayer cards take {Amount} additional turn.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_SHORTCUT_POWER.title: Shortcut
NIGHTMOON-NUN_SHORTCUT_POWER.description: The next few Prayer cards you play take 1 fewer turn.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_SHORTCUT_POWER.smartDescri: The next {Amount} Prayer cards you play take 1 fewer turn.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_FOG_POWER.title: Fog
NIGHTMOON-NUN_FOG_POWER.description: The next few times you lose HP, lose half as much.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_FOG_POWER.smartDescription: The next {Amount} times you lose HP, lose half as much.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_DEMON_BLADE_POWER.title: Demon Blade
NIGHTMOON-NUN_DEMON_BLADE_POWER.descript: At the start of your turn, deal floor-based damage to a random enemy.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_DEMON_BLADE_POWER.smartDes: At the start of your turn, deal floor-based damage to a random enemy.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_HOLY_AREA_POWER.title: Holy Area
NIGHTMOON-NUN_HOLY_AREA_POWER.descriptio: Whenever a Prayer resolves, gain Block.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_HOLY_AREA_POWER.smartDescr: Whenever a Prayer resolves, gain {Amount} Block.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_MIND_BLOOM_POWER.title: Mind Bloom
NIGHTMOON-NUN_KARMA_STAIN_POWER.title: Karma Stain
NIGHTMOON-NUN_KARMA_STAIN_POWER.descript: At the end of your turn, Confession triggers additional times, then Confession decreases by that much more.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_KARMA_STAIN_POWER.smartDes: At the end of your turn, Confession triggers {Amount} additional times, then Confession decreases by that much more.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_RADIANT_FORM_POWER.title: Indestructible
NIGHTMOON-NUN_RADIANT_FORM_POWER.smartDe: Damage you take is capped at {Amount}.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_JUSTICE_SCALE_POWER.title: Scales of Justice
NIGHTMOON-NUN_JUSTICE_SCALE_POWER.descri: At the start of your turn, deal damage equal to a percentage of the total damage you dealt this combat to a random enemy.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_JUSTICE_SCALE_POWER.smartD: At the start of your turn, deal damage equal to {Amount}% of the total damage you dealt this combat to a random enemy.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_FINAL_HOPE_POWER.title: Final Hope
